action.reasoning: Observation: iter14 recovered near-best bal_acc=0.5846 (val=0.568) with clean 2-stage (Focal/s1-AdamW-sqrt60ep + CE/s2-SGD0.05-mom0.9-nesterov-count30ep on fc-only), few_shot improved to 0.369. Best remains 0.5853 from iter11 (val=0.571). No grad error fixed. Analysis: cRT+Focal+logit-adj(tau=0.75) effective but tau suboptimal (fixed); val balanced so can grid-search tau post-training on val to max val_acc (==bal_acc) and save best_tau in ckpt. This is lightweight, adds <10s, should lift overall bal_acc by better head/tail tradeoff without retraining. Decision: rewrite full clean train.py (match best config, add post-stage2 best-tau grid search 0-2.0 step 0.1 on loaded best ckpt, save best_tau+class_counts, seeds, metrics.jsonl-only, 60/30ep), update predict.py to load+use best_tau if present (fallback 0.75); run then submit_eval immediately for expected new best ~0.59 (fits ~5min iter, >20ep rule satisfied via immediate eval).
